slide3.title: Fight food waste

biz4.description: Monitor your sales stats, food saved, and customer reviews from your dashboard.

profile.oauthAccountNote: Your email and password are managed by {{provider}}. Change them directly in your {{provider}} account.
profile.title: Profile
profile.restartRequired: The app needs to restart to apply the new language.
profile.faqContent:
Frequently Asked Questions

• How do I reserve a basket?
Browse available baskets, select one, choose quantity and pickup time, then confirm.

• What is a surprise basket?
A surprise basket contains a variety of unsold items from the merchant. Contents vary daily based on availability.

• How do pickup windows work?
Select a pickup time window that works for you. Arrive during that time to collect your basket.

• What payment methods are accepted?
Pay directly to the merchant when you pick up your basket (cash or card at the store).

• How do I cancel a reservation?
Go to the Orders tab, select your order, and tap Cancel.

• Are the baskets the same every day?
No, the contents vary depending on the day's unsold items. That's the surprise!
profile.mission: Our mission is to fight food waste by connecting people with delicious surprise baskets from local merchants.

availability.title: Availability
availability.customWarningBody:
1 or more baskets have custom pickup times and were not modified.
Go to My Baskets to verify they're still correct.
availability.tooShort: Pickup window must be at least 15 minutes long.
availability.orderConflictBody: One or more active orders are for baskets that use the location's pickup hours. You can't shrink these hours until those orders are completed — you can only extend them.
availability.expandConfirmBody:
One or more active orders are for baskets that use the location's pickup hours. Changing these hours will change their pickup windows too.

You're extending the window (not shrinking it), so this is allowed: the affected customers will be notified. However, until those orders are completed you won't be able to bring the window back to a shorter time.
availability.conflictMessage_one: {{count}} basket has times outside the new business window ({{start}}-{{end}}). Its times will be adjusted to fit. Continue?

availability.pauseDesc: Temporarily blocks customers from reserving. Your basket counts are kept.

availability.errCrossReset: The window crosses 03:30 (daily reset). Start at 03:30 or later, or end at 03:29 or earlier.

legal.privacyContent:
*Barakeat App — Platform for selling unsold food*

Barakeat is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains what data we collect, why, how we use it and what your rights are.

---

## 1. Who are we?

Société Barakit 112003 is the controller of your personal data in connection with your use of the Barakeat app and website.

Contact: contact@barakeat.tn

---

## 2. Data we collect

### Data you provide

- First and last name
- Email address
- Phone number
- Chosen sign-in method (Google, Apple or email)

### Data generated by your use

- Your order history
- Your Barakeat credits balance and history
- Approximate location (only to display nearby businesses, if you allow it)
- Push notification identifier (to send you notifications about your orders)
- Technical and diagnostic data — crash and performance reports (via our provider Sentry), used only to detect and fix app issues

### Data we do not collect

Barakeat does not store any banking data. Online payments are handled entirely by ClicToPay, our secure payment provider.

---

## 3. Why do we use your data?

We use your personal data only for specific and legitimate reasons.

Some uses are necessary to provide the service: creating and managing your account, processing your reservations and payments, managing your Barakeat credits, and sending you notifications about your orders. Without this data, we simply cannot provide the service.

Other uses rely on your consent: if you agree, we may send you promotional offers and Barakeat news. You can withdraw this consent at any time from the app settings.

Finally, we use some data in anonymous and aggregated form to improve the platform — for example to understand which types of business are the most popular. These analyses never make it possible to identify you personally.

We keep your data only for as long as necessary for these purposes, and we never use it for other purposes without informing you.

---

## 4. Sharing your data

Barakeat never sells your personal data. Your data may only be shared with:

- **ClicToPay**: for secure online payment processing.
- **Partner Businesses**: only the name and order number, needed to prepare and hand over your Surprise Basket.
- **Competent authorities**: where required by law.

---

## 5. Retention period

- **Account data**: kept for the entire time you use your account, then deleted within 30 days of account deletion.
- **Order data**: kept for 3 years for accounting and legal purposes.
- **Barakeat credits**: deleted with the account.

---

## 6. Your rights

Under applicable Tunisian law, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

- **Right of access**: you can ask to see the data we hold about you.
- **Right to rectification**: you can correct your information directly from the app.
- **Right to erasure**: you can delete your account and your data from the app.
- **Right to object**: you can object to your data being used for marketing purposes at any time.

To exercise these rights, contact us at: contact@barakeat.tn.

---

## 7. Notifications and marketing communications

Barakeat may send you push notifications and emails about:

- Your reservations and orders (mandatory, tied to the service).
- Promotional offers, news and discount codes (according to your notification preferences, which you can change at any time in settings).

You can withdraw your consent to marketing communications at any time from the app settings or by contacting us at contact@barakeat.tn.

---

## 8. Data security

Barakeat puts in place appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or disclosure. Payments are entirely secured by ClicToPay and Barakeat does not store any banking data.

---

## 9. Cookies and trackers

The Barakeat app may use technical trackers needed for its proper operation (session, user preferences). No third-party advertising trackers are used.

---

## 10. Changes to this policy

Barakeat may modify this policy at any time. In the event of a significant change, you will be notified by an in-app notification. The version in force is always available from the app and on our website.

---

## Contact

*For any question about this privacy policy:*

contact@barakeat.tn

*Last updated: 28/05/2026*
legal.termsContent:
*Last updated: 28/05/2026*

---

## 1. About Barakeat

Barakeat is a digital platform accessible via mobile app (iOS and Android) and website. It allows partner food businesses to offer their unsold items at a discount, and users to reserve and collect them directly at the shop.

By downloading the app or accessing the platform, you accept these Terms of Use (the Terms) without reservation. If you do not accept these Terms, you may not use Barakeat.

---

## 2. Account creation and management

### Registration

To reserve a Surprise Basket, you must create a Barakeat account. Registration is available via:

- Email address and password
- Sign in with Google
- Sign in with Apple
- Phone number (OTP code)

You must be at least 16 years old to create an account. By registering, you confirm that the information you provide is accurate and up to date.

### Account security

You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials. Barakeat cannot be held liable for any unauthorised use of your account. If you suspect a compromise, contact us immediately at contact@barakeat.tn.

### Account deletion

You can delete your account at any time directly from the app. Deletion is final and irreversible. All data associated with your account will be erased, including your order history and your Barakeat credits, which will be lost with no possibility of refund.

> Warning: deleting your account causes the permanent loss of your Barakeat credits. This action is irreversible.

You cannot delete your account while you have an order in progress (status: reserved, pending or confirmed). Please wait for the pickup or cancel the order before proceeding with deletion.

In line with our retention policy, your data is kept for 30 days after deletion, then permanently erased. During that period, your name remains shown on past orders with our partner businesses; after that, it is anonymised.

---

## 3. Reserving surprise baskets

### How it works

A Surprise Basket is a selection of unsold food products offered by a Partner Business at a reduced price. The exact contents of a Surprise Basket are not guaranteed and depend on what is available on the day. By reserving, you accept this principle.

### Reservation process

Once we receive the Reservation, we will forward it to the relevant business. We will confirm that the Reservation has been received and provide you with a code to be scanned by the merchant, redeemable for a Surprise Basket at the relevant business. It is your responsibility to ensure the code can be presented and validated by the business at Pickup.

You must collect the Surprise Basket reserved on the app at the designated location during the window indicated in the app and the reservation. At pickup, you must show your code in the app to the business, after which the business will scan it and hand over the reserved Surprise Basket. If you do not collect your Surprise Basket within the time indicated in the reservation, the Surprise Basket may no longer be available and we may charge you the Reservation Price.

### Responsibility for contents

Barakeat is an intermediary between you and the Partner Business. The quality, freshness and conformity of the products are the sole responsibility of the Partner Business. Barakeat cannot be held liable for the contents of Surprise Baskets.

---

## 4. Payment

### Payment methods

Barakeat accepts the following payment methods:

- Online payment by bank card via ClicToPay (when this payment method is available in the app).
- Cash payment directly to the Partner Business at pickup.
- Payment in Barakeat credits.

### Payment security

Online payments are processed by ClicToPay, our secure payment provider. Barakeat does not store any banking data. If you have a problem with an online payment, contact us at contact@barakeat.tn.

---

## 5. Cancellation and refunds

### Cancellation by the user

You can cancel your reservation up to 1 hour after making it, when payment was made by bank card. If you cancel within this window, the amount paid online is refunded as Barakeat credits. No refund is possible after this window.

### Cancellation by the Partner Business

In general, businesses may cancel your reservation up to one hour before the start of the pickup window. However, a business may sometimes cancel more than one hour before the pickup time if necessary (for example, if the business no longer has the surplus food it expected to have at pickup time). If a business cancels, you will receive a cancellation notice by email, SMS and/or the app, provided you have given us the correct contact information and have agreed to receive such notifications.

### Complaint after pickup

If you believe the Surprise Basket you received has a serious issue (spoiled product, quantity clearly inadequate compared to the price paid), you can submit a complaint through the app within 24 hours of pickup. Barakeat will review every complaint and, if it is found valid, will refund you in the form of Barakeat credits.

> Reminder: the variable contents of a Surprise Basket are inherent to the concept of the platform. A complaint based solely on the fact that the Surprise Basket did not contain the products you hoped for will not be accepted.

---

## 6. Barakeat credits

### How they work

Barakeat credits are virtual credits usable only on the Barakeat platform. They can be obtained in two ways:

- As a refund following an accepted cancellation or complaint.
- Through promotional codes or campaigns run by Barakeat.

### Terms of use

- Credits can only be used to pay for purchases on the Barakeat platform.
- Credits cannot be converted into cash and are not refundable.
- Credits do not expire.
- If the account is deleted, credits are permanently lost.

### Promotional codes

Barakeat may issue promotional codes granting credits to their holders. These codes are subject to the specific conditions communicated when they are issued. Barakeat reserves the right to cancel any code used abusively.

---

## 7. Rules of use

By using Barakeat, you agree to:

- Not create fake accounts or impersonate a third party.
- Not make repeated and abusive cancellations. Frequent cancellations may lead to a temporary or permanent account suspension, at Barakeat's discretion.
- Not submit fraudulent or abusive complaints.
- Not attempt to bypass the platform's payment system.
- Treat Partner Businesses and their staff with respect.

Barakeat reserves the right to suspend or delete any account that breaches these rules, without notice and without refund of any credits.

---

## 8. Limitation of liability

Barakeat takes all reasonable steps to ensure the proper functioning of the platform but cannot guarantee continuous and uninterrupted availability. Barakeat cannot be held liable for:

- The contents, quality or conformity of the products sold by Partner Businesses.
- Service interruptions linked to maintenance operations or to events beyond its control.
- Any indirect loss arising from the use of the platform.

---

## 9. Modification of these terms

Barakeat reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. In the event of a significant change, you will be informed by an in-app notification. Continued use of the platform after notification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

---

## 10. Applicable law

These Terms are governed by Tunisian law. In case of a dispute, and after attempting an amicable settlement, the Court of First Instance of Tunis shall have sole jurisdiction.

---

## Contact

*For any question regarding these Terms:*

contact@barakeat.tn
legal.cookiesContent:
*Last updated: 28/05/2026*

---

## 1. What we use

As a mobile application, Barakeat does not use browser cookies. We use the following local storage mechanisms:

- **Secure storage**: your authentication token is stored using your device's secure storage.
- **AsyncStorage**: we store your preferences locally (language, notifications, selected address).

---

## 2. Purpose

These local data are used exclusively to:

- Keep you signed in between sessions
- Remember your settings
- Provide a personalised experience

---

## 3. Your control

You can clear all local data by signing out or by uninstalling the app.

---

## 4. Contact

*For any question about this cookie policy:*

contact@barakeat.tn

wallet.title: Barakeat Credits
wallet.earnCreditsShort: Earn and use your Barakeat credits
wallet.earnDesc: Stay consistent with your order streaks, watch for Barakeat gift codes you can enter, and discover other fun ways to boost your balance!
wallet.codeNotFoundOrExpired: This code doesn’t exist or has expired.
wallet.codeUnverifiable: We couldn’t verify this code right now. Check the spelling and try again — the code wasn’t used.
wallet.scanHint: Point the camera at the voucher's QR code.
wallet.cameraPermDesc: Allow camera access to scan voucher QR codes.

walkthrough.tapToContinue: Tap the highlighted button to continue.
walkthrough.tapCardToContinue: Tap the highlighted card to continue.

demoWelcome.title: Welcome to the Barakeat demo
demoWelcome.desc: We'll walk you through the app without creating a real order. Tap Start when you're ready, or Quit to cancel.

discover.title: Explore
discover.desc: Browse surprise baskets available near you. Filter by category, distance, or price.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.desc: Track your current reservations, view past orders, and communicate with businesses.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.desc: Find your favorite places in one tap and get notified when they have baskets available.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.desc: Your level, badges, impact stats, and settings. Track your progress!

addLocation.title: Add your first location
addLocation.desc: Before creating baskets or receiving orders, add your business address. Tap the green button to get started.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Overview of your sales, today's orders, and stats. All at a glance.

baskets.title: My Baskets
baskets.desc: Create and manage your surprise baskets. Set prices, quantities, and pickup times.

basketCreate.title: Add a Basket
basketCreate.desc: Tap the + Add basket button. You can reuse a basket already created in your organization, or create a brand-new one from scratch.

reuseBasket.title: Reuse a basket
reuseBasket.desc: Your existing baskets appear here. Tap "Use" to add the same basket to this location — it's copied with its own quantity, independent from the original (you set it afterwards).

createNewBasket.title: Create a new basket
createNewBasket.desc: Or build one from scratch: tap "Create a new basket" to open the form. The tour resumes when the form opens.

orders.title: Orders
orders.desc: This is the orders page — empty for now. Tap Next to see what happens when an order arrives.

pickup.title: Confirm Pickup
pickup.desc: Two ways to verify a pickup: 1) the Confirm button on the order — the customer reads out their 4-digit code and you type it in. 2) This QR button (highlighted) — opens the scanner to read their code directly. Try it now.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Manage your business info, hours, and photos.

team.title: Team Management
team.desc: Invite members, assign roles (admin, member) and tie them to specific locations.

settingsDemo.title: Replay this tour
settingsDemo.desc: You can come back here any time and tap "Demo Mode" to see this walkthrough again.
settingsDemo.hint: Look for the highlighted Demo Mode row.

biz.demoBasketDesc: Demo — changes won't affect your real baskets.

formPickup.title: Pickup window
formPickup.desc: The time slot when customers come to collect their basket. Tick the box only if this basket has hours different from your shop's — otherwise leave it unchecked and your profile hours (which you'll see later) will be used.

formReinit.title: Daily reset
formReinit.desc: How many baskets you put back in stock each day.

formConfirm.title: Publish basket
formConfirm.desc: Tap here to publish your basket. (Nothing is sent in demo mode.)

demoBasket.title: Your demo basket
demoBasket.desc: This is what a published basket looks like in your list.

basketQty.title: Adjust quantity
basketQty.desc: Tap the highlighted basket card to open the availability sheet. You can adjust today's quantity with the +/- buttons there, no need to recreate the basket.

modalMinus.title: Decrease quantity
modalMinus.desc: Tap − to remove one basket from today's quantity.

modalPlus.title: Increase quantity
modalPlus.desc: Tap + to add one basket to today's quantity.

modalSave.title: Save
modalSave.desc: Tap "Save" to confirm the new availability. (Nothing is sent in demo mode.)

basketCardQty.title: Quantity updated
basketCardQty.desc: The new quantity is now visible on the basket card. Tap "Next" to continue.

orderArrives.title: An order is arriving!
orderArrives.desc: A new order just came in.

orderCard.title: An order!
orderCard.desc: Tap the card to expand and see all order details.

orderChat.title: Message the customer
orderChat.desc: Tap the chat icon to open the conversation with the customer.

chatBack.title: Back to the order
chatBack.desc: This is the conversation with the customer. Tap the back arrow at the top-left to return to the orders list and continue the demo.

orderConfirm.title: Confirm pickup
orderConfirm.desc: Tap the highlighted button to open the pickup verification sheet.

verifyInput.title: Enter the pickup code
verifyInput.desc: The customer shows you their pickup code. Type it here — for example DEMO — then tap "Confirm Code" to validate, or tap Next to continue the demo.

notifPopup.desc: A new order just came in. Tap "View order" to open it.

qrFab.title: QR scan shortcut
qrFab.desc: Don't want to scroll through the list? Tap this bottom-right button to jump straight to the scanner.

scanQrBack.title: Scan the customer's QR
scanQrBack.desc: This is the scan screen. In real use you'd scan the QR code on the customer's phone. Tap the highlighted × at the top-left to return to the orders and continue the demo.

scanManual.title: Type the code
scanManual.desc: No QR? The highlighted icon (top-right) toggles to manual code entry.

profileTeam.title: Team management
profileTeam.desc: Tap the highlighted card to open team management.

teamOrg.title: Your organization
teamOrg.desc: A snapshot of your organization: members and locations. This is the overall scope you manage here.

teamMembers.title: Your members
teamMembers.desc: All team members appear here. Invite new ones, adjust their roles and permissions, or remove them.

teamLocations.title: Your locations
teamLocations.desc: All your points of sale appear here. You can add new ones, edit them, or remove them.

teamAddLocation.title: Add a location
teamAddLocation.desc: Tap the highlighted + button to add a new point of sale.

teamAddMember.title: Add a member
teamAddMember.desc: Tap the highlighted + button to invite a new member to the team.

profileInfo.title: Business info
profileInfo.desc: Edit your address, hours, and contact details.

firstCard.title: An available basket
firstCard.desc: Tap the card to see details and reserve.

openMap.title: Open the map
openMap.desc: Tap this button to see all baskets around you on a map.

heart.title: Add to favorites
heart.desc: Find your favorite places in the Favorites tab.

wallet.title: Your credits
wallet.desc: Use them as a payment method any time.

recharge.title: Top up
recharge.desc: Add credits or redeem a gift code.

notif.title: Notifications
notif.desc: Track your orders and discounts in real time.

radius.title: Search radius
radius.desc: Tap the radius to expand it or make it smaller — control how far around your address we search.

radiusExpanded.title: Adjust your radius
radiusExpanded.desc: Drag the slider to widen or narrow the search distance. You can also change the address from this card.

cash.title: Cash payment
cash.desc: Read the note before confirming your reservation.

pickup.title: Pickup code
pickup.desc: Show this code to the merchant to collect your basket.

customer.demoBasketDesc: Demo — no real order is created.

restaurantBasket.title: The surprise basket
restaurantBasket.desc: Here is a basket offered by this spot. Tap it to see the details.

reserveBtn.title: Reserve this basket
reserveBtn.desc: Tap the "Reserve" button to start the order.

reserveQty.title: Choose quantity
reserveQty.desc: Pick how many baskets you want to reserve.

reserveConfirm.title: Confirm reservation
reserveConfirm.desc: Tap "Confirm" to send your demo order.

demoOrderCard.title: Your reservation
demoOrderCard.desc: Here's your order on the Orders tab. Tap the card to see the pickup details.

demoPickupCode.title: Pickup code
demoPickupCode.desc: Show this code to the merchant when you arrive to collect your basket.

backToHome.title: Back to Home
backToHome.desc: Now let's see the rest of the app.

messages.title: Messages
messages.closeConfirmBody: No one will be able to send messages in this conversation anymore. The history is kept.
messages.blockConfirmBody: The customer won’t be able to message you in this conversation anymore. You can still send them messages.

report.title: Report this customer
report.subtitle: Why are you reporting this conversation?
report.otherPrompt: Describe the problem in a few words.
report.infoSubtitle: Here's the status of your report.
report.statusUnderReview: Forwarded to our team — under review
report.thanksBody: This conversation has been forwarded to our team. We'll get back to you if needed.

messages.conversationClosedInfo: Conversation closed — no one can write here anymore.
messages.blockedInfo: The merchant has blocked replies in this conversation.

banner.closed: This conversation is closed. No one can send messages here anymore — you can still read the history.
banner.blockedMerchant: You blocked the customer’s replies in this conversation. You can still send them messages; they can’t reply.
banner.blockedBuyer: The merchant has blocked replies in this conversation. You can no longer write to them here, but they can still message you.

messages.messagePlaceholder: Write a message to the customer...
messages.emptySubtitleCanReply: Write the first message to start the conversation.
messages.emptySubtitle: Messages will appear here as soon as they arrive.
messages.archiveConfirmBody: It will disappear from your list.

surprise.a: A “surprise bag” is a mix of products made up of a food business's unsold items (bakery, restaurant, café…). But what exactly? Surprise…

knowContent.q: Do I know what's inside my “surprise bag”?
knowContent.a:
That's the whole magic of the concept: the surprise! You don't know the exact contents in advance, but you'll always receive products from the business you chose.
To guide you better, some businesses with a wide range of products even offer different types of surprise bags (for example sweet, savoury, bakery…), so the surprise matches your cravings as closely as possible.

why.q: Why launch this concept in Tunisia?
why.a: Food waste costs the Tunisian population more than 500 million dinars a year. So you save money and, in return, you help save the planet!

region.q: Which region is Barakeat available in?
region.a: Barakeat is currently available across all the towns of Greater Tunis. We'll keep you posted on our arrival in other regions.

impact.q: Will I really help fight food waste?
impact.a: Yes, massively! Every bag saved keeps precious resources out of the bin. Every action counts!

pickup.q: How do I pick up my “surprise bag”?
pickup.a: Once you've reserved through the app, head to the business during the collection window, show your QR code, and that's it! All that's left is to enjoy!

delivery.a: Not for now. Bags are collected directly from the business. It's also a chance to meet the merchants near you! That said, delivery is one of the options we're exploring for the future.

notifications.q: How do I know when a business posts new bags?
notifications.a: Add your favourite businesses to your favourites: you'll get a notification as soon as new bags are available. No more constant checking — we'll let you know at the right moment!

someoneElse.q: Can someone pick up the “surprise bag” for me?
someoneElse.a: Absolutely! The other person simply needs your name and reservation number, and they'll be able to validate and collect your order.

cancel.q: What happens if I cancel my order?
cancel.a:
If you paid by bank card, you can cancel within the following hour and get the amount back as Barakeat credits. After that, no refund is possible.
For orders paid in cash, repeated no-shows may lead to restrictions on your account.

contact.q: Who can I contact if I have a problem with my order?
contact.a: If the problem concerns the business itself, the easiest way is to report it directly from the app, describing what happened. For any other question or difficulty, you can email us at contact@barakeat.tn. In all cases, our team will get back to you as soon as possible to find a solution.

whyUnknown.q: Why don't I know what's in the “surprise bag”?
whyUnknown.a: Because these are the day's unsold items. Businesses can't predict what they'll have left and promise you specific contents.

stillGood.q: Is the food I receive still good?
stillGood.a: Absolutely! The products offered are from the same day, fresh, and perfectly fit for consumption.

howToPay.q: What payment methods are available on Barakeat?
howToPay.a:
You have the following payment methods to choose from:
In cash, directly at the business, when you pick up your bag.
With your Barakeat credits, usable as a payment method within the app.
Online by bank card via ClicToPay, when this payment method is available in the app, to pay before heading over.

secure.a: Yes. All card payments go through ClicToPay, a secure solution. Your bank details are neither stored nor shared by Barakeat.

credits.q: How do I get Barakeat credits?
credits.a: Your Barakeat credits can be obtained through gift codes that we share during contests, events, or refunds. They're added automatically to your balance and can be used from your next order.

register.q: How do I register my business?
register.a: It couldn't be simpler! Just fill in the online form, and our team will get back to you as soon as possible to finalise your registration.

types.q: What types of businesses can join Barakeat?
types.a: Barakeat is open to all food businesses that want to make the most of their unsold items and fight food waste: bakeries, grocery stores, restaurants, caterers, supermarkets and many more. If you have products to offer, there's a place for you here.

cost.q: How much does registering on Barakeat cost?
cost.a: Registration is 100% free and there are no fixed fees to pay. Barakeat earns only through a commission on completed sales: if you sell nothing, you pay nothing.

howItWorks.q: How does the surprise bag work for merchants?
howItWorks.a:
You're the one who puts together your “surprise bags” from your products of the day. To guarantee your customers' satisfaction and everyone's trust, two simple principles apply:
The products offered are perfectly fit for consumption: they're good products, simply unsold or in surplus, never used or expired items.
Their price in the bag is at least 50% lower than their usual selling price, to offer your customers a real bargain.

equipment.q: Do I need any special equipment?
equipment.a: No, a simple smartphone is enough. You manage your bags, your orders and your availability directly from our app.

noSurplus.q: What happens if I have no unsold items one day?
noSurplus.a: No worries — and it's even good news: you're under no obligation to post bags, and a day with no surplus is simply a day with no waste. You stay entirely free to offer bags whenever you have them.
